title: Plugin Version Cache
description: Schema for .github/plugin-versions-cache.json — the machine-readable plugin inventory maintained by the plugin-version-check workflow.

generated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the file was last written by the workflow.

plugins.description: Keyed by WP-CLI plugin slug (directory name under wp-content/plugins/).

status.description: Last known status on production, as reported by WP-CLI.

source_type.description: Determines how (and whether) the workflow can auto-check for a newer version.

installed_version.description: Version currently installed on production. Null if the plugin was not found in the last WP-CLI scan.

latest_version.description: Latest version known from the upstream source. Null for premium/saas plugins with no queryable API, or before the first successful check.

latest_checked.description: ISO date of the last successful upstream version check. Null if never checked.

github_repo.description: GitHub repo in owner/repo format. Required when source_type is github; null if the repo URL is unknown.

github_repo_note.description: Free-text note explaining why github_repo is null or how to find the correct repo.

github_tag_strip.description: String prefix to strip from the GitHub tag before treating it as a version. Defaults to 'v' if absent. Use when repos tag as 'plugin-name-1.2.3' instead of 'v1.2.3' or '1.2.3'.

vendor_url.description: Vendor domain (e.g. gravityforms.com). Informational; used for premium and saas entries.

update_api.description: Vendor update API configuration. Present only for premium/saas plugins where the update endpoint is known.

type.description: edd: EDD Software Licensing (?edd_action=get_version). acf_rest: ACF custom REST endpoint with X-ACF-License header. tgm: TGM-style key/plugin-param API.

endpoint.description: Full URL of the update API endpoint.

version_field.description: JSON key in the API response that contains the version string (e.g. new_version, version).

license_secret.description: Name of the GitHub Actions secret containing the license key. If absent or unset, the workflow tries unauthenticated first.

auth_note.description: Human note about authentication requirements (e.g. whether unauthenticated calls are known to work).

item_name.description: EDD item name as registered in the vendor's store. Required for type=edd.

item_name_note.description: Note about how to verify the item_name if the API returns item_not_found.

params.description: Additional query parameters to append to the endpoint URL (used by acf_rest).

license_header.description: HTTP header name for the license key (used by acf_rest, e.g. X-ACF-License).

action.description: Action name for TGM-style APIs (e.g. get-plugin-update).

action_param.description: Query parameter name for the action (default: action).

plugin_slug.description: Plugin slug value passed in the plugin_param for TGM-style APIs.

plugin_param.description: Query parameter name for the plugin slug (default: tgm-updater-plugin).

key_param.description: Query parameter name for the license key in TGM-style APIs (default: tgm-updater-key).
